feed.title: Current Watches, Warnings and Advisories for New Zealand issued by MetService
feed.rights: Copyright Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited, 2026. Licensed under Creative Commons BY 4.0.

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 100 to 150 mm of rain. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour expected, and there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour, which may or may not be associated with thunderstorms. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Area extended slightly farther north. Also, timing for onset of heavy rain brought forward, and cessation delayed.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Periods of heavy rain, and a low risk of localised downpours. Accumulations may approach warning criteria in some places. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Moderate. Changes: Area extended westwards, and timing for cessation of heavy rain delayed.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 80 to 120 mm of rain, especially north of Cape Rodney. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour expected, and there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour, which may or may not be accompanied by thunderstorms. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low. Changes: Timing for onset of heavy rain brought forward.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Warning - Orange
entry.summary: Expect 80 to 120 mm of rain. Intensities of 15 to 25 mm per hour expected, and there is a chance of downpours of 25 to 40 mm per hour, which may or may not be accompanied by thunderstorms. Impact: Streams and rivers may rise rapidly. Surface flooding, slips, and difficult driving conditions possible. Chance of upgrading to a Red Warning: Low.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited

entry.title: Heavy Rain Watch
entry.summary: Rain, with heavy falls possible. Accumulations may approach warning criteria in localised places. Chance of upgrading to a Warning: Low. Changes: Timing for both onset and cessation of heavy rain brought forward.

author.name: Meteorological Service of New Zealand Limited
